letter:
My darling Zara,

Three years ago I didn't know that saying yes to one dinner would mean saying yes to a whole life. But here we are — and every single day since has felt like a gift I didn't earn.

You are the person I look for in every room. The voice that makes the whole day make sense. The reason I believe in things like fate and luck and all the soft words I used to roll my eyes at.

Today is just a date on a calendar. But it carries the weight of everything we've built together.

I love you. More than these words, always.

messagesFromGroup.name: Mum
messagesFromGroup.message: From the moment I met you, I knew you were the one for him. Love you both.

messagesFromGroup.name: Priya
messagesFromGroup.message: Three years of watching you two and I still get butterflies. Happy anniversary!

messagesFromGroup.name: James
messagesFromGroup.message: You make each other better. That's all that matters. Cheers to many more.

questions.text: Where did we go on our very first date?
questions.correctAnswer: That little Italian place on Fifth
options: That little Italian place on Fifth

questions.text: What song was playing when we danced in the kitchen?
What did I say the first time I told you I loved you?
questions.correctAnswer: I'm not great with words, but I love you
options: I love you more than words
I'm not great with words, but I love you
I never want this to end

customClosingMessage: Three years. A lifetime to go. Forever begins here, Zara.
